com.mentor.chs.plugin.task

Interface IXTaskProgress


  • @NotToBeImplemented
public interface IXTaskProgress
    This is used to track progress of a task. Custom task implementation keeps on updating this object while it progresses.

    During batch execution mode it will get logged in the log file and in future it might be stored with task execution information in database.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void progressPercentage(int percentage)
      Not used by the framework now but in future it will be periodically updated in database Set the amount of work that has been accomplished now.
      void progressText(java.lang.String text)
      Called by the implemented task to update the progress.

    • Method Detail

      • progressText

        void progressText(java.lang.String text)
        Called by the implemented task to update the progress.
        Parameters:
        text - - progress message representing the current state of the task execution.

      • progressPercentage

        void progressPercentage(int percentage)
        Not used by the framework now but in future it will be periodically updated in database Set the amount of work that has been accomplished now. The value is between 0 and 100. Invalid values are ignored
        Parameters:
        percentage - the amount work
